creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text:
As per the instructions on the "User Groups" page (http://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html) I'm requesting the addition of the Ulyanovsk FreeBSD Users Group (ULBSD) on the page. 1. URL: http://www.ulbsd.ru 2. Email Contact: info@ulbsd.ru 3. Group Description (HTML-ized):

The Ulyanovsk FreeBSD Users Group (ULBSD) is for russian users of ULBSD operating system that is based on FreeBSD. We provide free and paid versions of our operating system. We also answer many questions of users for free and help them work in the FreeBSD and ULBSD. For more information send an email to info@ulbsd.ru or visit the website at http://www.ulbsd.ru/.
